qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_concepto as ID, t.c_concepto as CODE, t.d_concepto as TEXT, SEC.policy FROM LIQ14_CONCEPTOS as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Conceptos.CONCEPTO\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_concepto LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.c_concepto={#SOURCE:helper-mess/@ID} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_concepto as ID, t.c_concepto as CODE, t.d_concepto as TEXT, SEC.policy FROM LIQ14_CONCEPTOS as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Conceptos.CONCEPTO\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_concepto LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.c_concepto={substring_before(#INDOC:@CODE,\'-\')} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_concepto as ID, t.c_concepto as CODE, t.d_concepto as TEXT, SEC.policy FROM LIQ14_CONCEPTOS as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Conceptos.CONCEPTO\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_concepto LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW
